name.description: Required. The resource name of the config. Must be in the format of, `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/googleChannelConfig`.

crypto_key_name.description: Optional. Resource name of a KMS crypto key (managed by the user) used to encrypt/decrypt their event data. It must match the pattern `projects/*/locations/*/keyRings/*/cryptoKeys/*`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
